FYI â August 2025
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Bill Payments Volume
CRA Business Taxes Part
Section 1.5, CRA Business Taxes Document Library
Section 8.1, Overview of Processing Business Tax Payments and Filings Electronically
We added references to Bank Truncation Guide for CRA Remittance Vouchers, Form 10138.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Online Return System (ORS) Part
Entire Part
We removed any references to CPA and replaced them with Payments Canada references instead.
Section 10.7, Settlement of Returned AFT Transactions
We added a minor clarification to this section. Canadian and US dollar AFT returns are both debited and credited to the appropriate Central 1 account.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Interac
eâTransfer
Â®
Online Administration System (OAS) Part
Section 4.8, Archived Data Searches
We updated two screenshots in Tracing
Interac
e-Transfer Transactions via OAS.
Wires Part
Section 15.6, Record Keeping and FINTRAC EFT Reporting
Section 16.10, Completing Representative/Conductor Details Section (Customizable Element)
Section 16.11, Completing the Beneficiary Section
We corrected information in these sections related to the recording of additional information about the representative and beneficiary of a wire and/or the reporting of large international outgoing wires. The information was updated to correspond with other sections in the part.
Document Library
Status
Transaction and Charge Codes
3667
Added a description column and removed two defunct transaction codes related to M2M transactions.
